name: 1962: The War In The Hills
overview: In the Sino-Indian War, 126 Indians defended a strategic pass against 3,000 enemy soldiers. This was a battle of dauntless courage, fought to the last bullet.

trailers.title: Hotstar Specials 1962 The War In The Hills | Official Trailer | Abhay Deol-Mahesh Manjrekar | Feb 26
